They used Notion, WeChat, Safari, Photos, Snipaste, and ChatGPT together, capturing questions like differentiability of a piecewise function, f(x)=sin(x^2) Maclaurin terms, a particle tangent line at t=1, Euler’s Method with f(1)=0, and evaluating ∫ dx/(3x-9). ChatGPT notes showed worked reasoning such as using the derivative definition for e^-x at x=1 and identifying local maxima from selected values of f'. The repeated switching across the review PDF, screenshots, and solution attempts indicates a concentrated problem-solving session for AP exam prep."

The user opened 2024 mcq+answer.pdf and worked through AP Calculus BC multiple-choice questions across derivatives, differentiability, Maclaurin series, tangent lines, local maxima, Euler’s Method, improper integrals, and limit reasoning. They used Notion, WeChat, Safari, Photos, Snipaste, and ChatGPT together, capturing questions like differentiability of a piecewise function, f(x)=sin(x^2) Maclaurin terms, a particle tangent line at t=1, Euler’s Method with f(1)=0, and evaluating ∫ dx/(3x-9). ChatGPT notes showed worked reasoning such as using the derivative definition for e^-x at x=1 and identifying local maxima from selected values of f'. The repeated switching across the review PDF, screenshots, and solution attempts indicates a concentrated problem-solving session for AP exam prep.
